wayne_home.title: Teaching Plans
wayne_home.desc: Every week I plan what my daughter Luna learns. This is the honest version — what I tried, what worked, what didn't. Steal anything useful.
wayne_home.card1_desc: What we covered, what tools we used, and the honest reaction from an 8-year-old.
wayne_home.card2_desc: A structured decision tree to find the right tools for your child's current stage.
wayne_home.card3_desc: Every Sunday, Luna publishes what she actually built and learned from my plan.
